# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent kong admin api exposed.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

admin_listen = "0.0.0.0:8001, 127.0.0.1:8002 ssl"
proxy_listen = "0.0.0.0:8000, 0.0.0.0:8443 ssl"

database = "postgres"
pg_host = "your_postgres_host"
pg_port = 5432
pg_user = "your_postgres_user"
pg_password = "your_postgres_password"
pg_database = "your_postgres_db"

# Secure Admin API settings
admin_gui_host = "127.0.0.1"
admin_gui_port = 8002
admin_listen = "0.0.0.0:8001 ssl" 

# Enable SSL for Admin API
admin_ssl_cert = "/path/to/your/admin_cert.pem"
admin_ssl_cert_key = "/path/to/your/admin_key.pem"

# Additional security settings
anonymous_reports = "off"
lua_package_path = "/usr/local/share/lua/5.1/?.lua;;"
lua_package_cpath = "/usr/local/lib/lua/5.1/?.so;;"
